mapper.insert: INSERT INTO post (title, content, user_id, type, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{title}, #{content}, #{userId}, #{type}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE post SET likes = likes + 1 WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE post SET likes = likes - 1 WHERE id = #{id} AND likes > 0
UPDATE post SET comments = comments + 1 WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE post SET comments = comments - 1 WHERE id = #{id} AND comments > 0
